headline: BASF Wraps Up EUR 7.7B Coatings Sale to Carlyle, Holds 40% Interest
summary: BASFY completed the sale of its coatings business to Carlyle for an enterprise value of EUR 7.7B, while retaining a 40% stake in Surventis for future upside.

raw.headline: BASF Wraps Up EUR 7.7B Coatings Sale to Carlyle, Holds 40% Interest
raw.summary: BASFY completed the sale of its coatings business to Carlyle for an enterprise value of EUR 7.7B, while retaining a 40% stake in Surventis for future upside.

headline: AEM Temporarily Suspends Barnat Pit Mining After Rock Mass Movement
summary: AEM suspends Barnat pit mining after rock mass movement, trims Canadian Malartic outlook, but Odyssey plans and long-term goals remain intact.

raw.headline: AEM Temporarily Suspends Barnat Pit Mining After Rock Mass Movement
raw.summary: AEM suspends Barnat pit mining after rock mass movement, trims Canadian Malartic outlook, but Odyssey plans and long-term goals remain intact.

headline: Air Products' Shares Surge 14% in a Month: What's Driving the Upside?
summary: APD's shares jump after exiting the Louisiana Clean Energy Complex and certain other projects, boosting investor confidence in its portfolio strategy and growth focus.

raw.headline: Air Products' Shares Surge 14% in a Month: What's Driving the Upside?
